task_completion.description: Log into FreeMED and locate the patient record for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED web interface is visible, and the patient dashboard or profile for 'Maria Santos' is open.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the coverage or insurance section to add a new policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or dialog for adding patient coverage/insurance is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the insurance company and plan name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The insurance company field shows 'BlueCross BlueShield' and the Plan Name field shows 'PPO Gold 500'.

task_completion.description: Enter the policy number and group number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Policy Number field contains 'BCB-2024-78432' and the Group Number field contains 'GRP-4401-EAST'.

task_completion.description: Enter the effective date, relationship, copay, and coverage type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form shows Effective Date as '2024-01-15', Relationship to Insured as 'Self', Copay as '25.00', and Type as 'Primary' (or '1').
A success message indicating the coverage was saved, or the newly added BlueCross BlueShield policy is visible in the patient's list of active coverages.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeMED web interface rather than using terminal commands or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the FreeMED application, with visible mouse clicks or form interactions.

integrity.description: The agent actually filled out the forms in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the data being typed into the actual FreeMED input fields, not just a text editor or a static HTML mock.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to alter the DOM to display the target values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Maria Santos. Target Insurance Company: BlueCross BlueShield. Policy Number: BCB-2024-78432. Group Number: GRP-4401-EAST. Plan Name: PPO Gold 500. Copay: 25.00. Effective Date: 2024-01-15. Relationship: Self. Type: Primary (1).
